markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on the Q4/Q1 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic is soaring:** Tool pages are driving a "hockey stick" growth curve, lifting weekly organic sessions from \~100 to over 500.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [**SERP features are a win:** Siit content is frequently cited in Google's AI Overviews and People Also Ask boxes, validating its high quality and authority.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [**Strategy is pivoting:** The focus is shifting from broad help desk content to deep "Service Desk" and "AI Agent" clusters to align with the new product positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [**Tracking is broken:** A June trial signup page migration to `app.siit.io` broke GA4 conversion tracking; fixing this is the top technical priority.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Tracking Issues

  - [**Problem:** GA4 conversion tracking is broken, likely due to a June migration of the trial signup page to `app.siit.io`.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Impact:** Key events like `form_submit` are not firing, preventing accurate CTA performance measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Solution:** The signup page will move back to the main site next week, which should resolve the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**Context:** Siit's best-ever month for pipeline creation was tracked in HubSpot, not GA4, confirming the tracking gap.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Engagement Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** Steady at \~200 seconds.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Pages/Session:** Low at \~1.5. The goal is to increase this via better internal linking and CTA placement.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Tool Pages → Growth Engine:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [**Performance:** Driving a "hockey stick" growth curve, lifting weekly organic sessions from \~100 to over 500.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [**SERP Feature Wins:** Content is frequently cited in Google's AI Overviews and People Also Ask boxes, validating its high quality.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
          - [**Examples:** Linear review, Google Workspace review, Jamf Alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot → Service Desk & AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [**Goal:** Replicate the success of help desk content for the new "Service Desk" and "AI Agent" positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [**Method:** Build deep content clusters by creating new articles and refreshing existing ones with updated messaging and internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [**Main Tools Page Redesign:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
      - [**Problem:** The page is long and ordered by recency, hiding high-value content.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
      - [**Solution:** Redesign to improve navigation and prioritize key tools (e.g., by volume, integration status).](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

### CTA & Demo Video Test

  - [**CTA Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
      - [**Plan:** Manually add integration-specific CTAs to \~10 tool pages, as it's more efficient than automation.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Requires the GA4 issue to be fixed to measure performance.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**Demo Video Test:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Asset:** A new 3-minute demo video is ready for testing.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
        1.  [A/B test a "Watch Demo" popover CTA vs. the current "Get Started" CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
        2.  [Embed the video directly on the page, separate from the primary CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [**Decision:** Matt and Jacob will brainstorm the best approach.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)

### Competitor Intel: RaveenaHQ

  - [**Observation:** Competitor RaveenaHQ's blog content appears to be directly copying Siit's strategy and topics.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
  - [**Action:** Matt will investigate RaveenaHQ's content and competitive position.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Grant Carmel editor access to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Investigate and fix the GA4 conversion tracking issue with Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [Define the "engaged session" metric and explore tracking it in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Brainstorm the demo video test strategy with Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Analyze RaveenaHQ's content and competitive position.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
      - [Manually add integration-specific CTAs to relevant tool pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9cbJ7FEGjFzExqKRu4mzuPGZFFx7ybHw?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
